titulo: Healthcare ransomware attacks surge 14% amid growing cyberthreats
resumo: A new report shows that healthcare organizations have faced 410 ransomware attacks in the first half of 2026, as regulatory efforts to bolster healthcare cybersecurity stalled.

titulo: Microsoft Patches 570 CVEs in Record Patch Tuesday
resumo: Microsoft released fixes for a record 570 CVEs in its July Patch Tuesday update, as experts warn AI is dramatically accelerating vulnerability discovery and increasing patch volumes
